title: Mercado de abasto
writer: Carlos A. Olivari, Sixto Pondal Ríos
actors: Tita Merello, Pepe Arias, Juan José Miguez
plot: The action occurs in Abasto Market in Buenos Aires, Argentina. A grown up single woman marries a mafia man who promised her he would change. After they've married, the past come to ruin the wife's life.
